pages.text: Every Core, Storage Unit, Terminal, and Bus joins through direct face adjacency. Cables are unnecessary. A line, wall, compact cube, or branching shape all work as long as there is an unbroken face-to-face route back to the Core.

Keep the Core and the blocks needed for an action in loaded chunks. If a terminal or bus stops responding after distant chunks unload, return to the network or use your pack's chunk-loading method. Also confirm that no second Core touches the same network.

Use Magic Storage's wrench or any compatible wrench in your main hand. $(thing)Right-click$() a directional Import or Export Bus to rotate it around the clicked face. Ordinary right-click on a Core, Unit, or Terminal does not invent a direction.
See $(l:magic_storage:recipes)Recipe Catalog$() for the exact crafting layout.

$(thing)Sneak-right-click$() any network block with a compatible wrench to dismantle it safely. The Core item carries its stored items, energy, identity, and installed stations. Inventory overflow is left at the block instead of being lost. Keep that dropped Core item safe before rebuilding elsewhere.
